M1750_REC_PSYCH M1750 (M0630) Receives Psych Nursing Services This field indicates whether the patient is receiving psychiatric nursing services at home provided by a qualified

M1800_CU_GROOMING M1800 (M0640) Current Grooming This field indicates the patient's current ability to tend safely to personal hygiene needs. 00 = Able to groom
